chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No 31 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 11.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
